name: Chinese Beef Jerky
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Flank steak or london broil
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat in half lengthwise and slice diagonally crosswise into paper-thin strips that are 1 1/2 to 2 inches wide and 4 inches long.
2. Transfer the sliced meat to a shallow pan.
3. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
4. Rub the marinade mixture thoroughly over the meat.
5. Arrange the meat on racks so each piece is in a single layer.
6. Let the marinated meat dry at room temperature overnight (do not refrigerate).
7. Preheat the oven to 250°F.
8. Line two large baking sheets with foil and place wire racks on top.
9. Arrange the meat on the racks in a single layer.
10. Bake for 30 minutes.
11. Reduce the oven temperature to 175°F and continue drying the meat for another 40 minutes, ensuring it is lightly brown but not burnt.
12. Let the meat continue to dry on the racks at room temperature overnight before packing into jars.
13. For added flavor and shine, brush the dried meat lightly with sesame oil.
14. Makes about 36 pieces.
